zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Bar於1125年出生在法國德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒姆素時，她的父親Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar48歲，母親Gisèle de Vaudémont36歲。她與Konrad Ier von Kyrburg結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1186年在德國海藍-普法爾茲維斯特瓦爾德可萊斯吉爾包格享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Bar was born in 1125, in Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France, her father, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, was 48 and her mother, Gisèle de Vaudémont, was 36. She married Konrad Ier von Kyrburg. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1186, in Kirburg, Westerwaldkreis, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Bar est née en 1125, à Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France, son père, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Gisèle de Vaudémont, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Konrad Ier von Kyrburg. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1186, à Kirburg, Westerwaldkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Bar 1125 in Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar 48 und ihre Mutter Gisèle de Vaudémont 36. Sie hat Konrad Ier von Kyrburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1186 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Kirburg, Westerwaldkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Bar è nata il nel 1125 nel Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, sua padre, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Gisèle de Vaudémont, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Konrad Ier von Kyrburg. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1186, nel Kirburg, Westerwaldkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 61 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Bar(이)가 1125년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우르테-트-모셀 모우슨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gisèle de Vaudémont(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 Konrad Ier von Kyrburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1186년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 웨스터월드크레이스 커버그에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Bar nasceu em 1125, em Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Gisèle de Vaudémont, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Konrad Ier von Kyrburg. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1186, em Kirburg, Westerwaldkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Bar родилась в 1125 г. в местности муссон, меурте-ет-моселл, гранд эст, Франция, её отцу по имени Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Gisèle de Vaudémont, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Konrad Ier von Kyrburg. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1186 г. в местности кирбург, вестирвалдкрис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde de Bar nació en 1125, en Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Gisèle de Vaudémont, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Konrad Ier von Kyrburg. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1186, en Kirburg, Westerwaldkreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 61 años.
